prompt: Refactor the curl sample using jq++. The sample is at samples/curl/. Place the refactored sources under samples/.refactored/curl/, shared base files under samples/.refactored/shared/, and create a generate.sh. Run generate.sh to produce samples/.generated/curl/, verify the output matches the original, and report metrics plus interesting findings.

assertions.name: semantic_equivalence
assertions.description: yq -S of original and generated curl.yaml produce identical sorted JSON

assertions.name: uses_extends_or_local
assertions.description: At least one .yaml++ file uses $extends or $local

assertions.name: line_reduction
assertions.description: Total lines in .yaml++ sources <= total lines in original .yaml files

assertions.name: shared_base_referenced
assertions.description: At least one file in samples/.refactored/shared/ is referenced from curl's .yaml++ sources
